title: Advanced Paraphrasing
description: Rewording ideas without copying structure or vocabulary; three techniques to sound original.
summary_pt_br: Parafrasear: mude estrutura (ativa↔passiva), sinônimos nas palavras-chave, junte ou separe frases.

scenes.subtitle_en: Rewording ideas without copying structure or vocabulary; three techniques to sound original.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Parafrasear: mude estrutura (ativa↔passiva), sinônimos nas palavras-chave, junte ou separe frases.

scenes.text_en: Rewording ideas without copying structure or vocabulary; three techniques to sound original. Today's focus: advanced paraphrasing. Original: 'The pandemic reshaped our daily lives.' Paraphrase: 'Everyday routines were fundamentally transformed by COVID-19.'
scenes.text_pt: Parafrasear: mude estrutura (ativa↔passiva), sinônimos nas palavras-chave, junte ou separe frases. Foco de hoje: advanced paraphrasing. Original vs parafraseado: mude estrutura e sinônimo.

scenes.title: Advanced Paraphrasing
scenes.body_en: Techniques: 1) Change sentence structure (active↔passive). 2) Replace key nouns with synonyms. 3) Break long sentences into two short ones or combine short ones into a complex one.
scenes.body_pt: Parafrasear: mude estrutura (ativa↔passiva), sinônimos nas palavras-chave, junte ou separe frases.

examples.en: Original: 'The pandemic reshaped our daily lives.' Paraphrase: 'Everyday routines were fundamentally transformed by COVID-19.'
examples.pt: Original vs parafraseado: mude estrutura e sinônimo.

examples.en: Paraphrasing well keeps the idea but changes the voice.
examples.pt: Boa paráfrase preserva a ideia e muda a voz.

examples.en: Lazy paraphrase is just synonym swapping — avoid it.
examples.pt: Paráfrase preguiçosa só troca sinônimo — evite.

exercise.question: Complete: "Original: 'The pandemic reshaped our daily lives.' Paraphrase: 'Everyday routines were ___ transformed by COVID-19.'"
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Original: 'The pandemic reshaped our daily lives.' Paraphrase: 'Everyday routines were fundamentally transformed by COVID-19.'"
exercise.hint_pt_br: Original vs parafraseado: mude estrutura e sinônimo.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Paraphrasing well keeps the idea but changes the voice.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "Paraphrasing well keeps the idea but changes the voice."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Boa paráfrase preserva a ideia e muda a voz.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Advanced Paraphrasing — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre advanced paraphrasing. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Three villages were devastated by the storm.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Three communities were wrecked in the hurricane.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Our working habits are transformed by technology.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Innovation reshapes the architecture of modern labor.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Innovation both reshapes and complicates modern labor.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Paraphrasing is writing the same idea with new hands.

scenes.title: The paraphrasing workshop
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Paraphrase a single source sentence three different ways. Use at least two paraphrasing techniques.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Zara opened a single sentence on the whiteboard and asked the class to rewrite it five different ways.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: The pandemic reshaped our daily lives — paraphrase this with both structural and lexical changes.

paragraphs.speaker: Student A
paragraphs.en: Everyday routines were fundamentally transformed by the spread of COVID-19 worldwide.

paragraphs.speaker: Student B
paragraphs.en: Our habits were remade, almost overnight, by the global health crisis of 2020.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Notice both of you preserved the idea but changed the voice — that's the real skill.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Paraphrasing, Zara said, is the closest thing to translation between one version of yourself and another.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Advanced Paraphrasing". Rewording ideas without copying structure or vocabulary; three techniques to sound original. Original: 'The pandemic reshaped our daily lives.' Paraphrase: 'Everyday routines were fundamentally transformed by COVID-19.' Paraphrasing well keeps the idea but changes the voice. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Advanced Paraphrasing". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
